title: Maximum Number That Makes Result of Bitwise AND Zero
titleCn: 使得按位与结果为 0 的最大数字

detail.title: Maximum Number That Makes Result of Bitwise AND Zero
hints: When performing bitwise AND operations sequentially down from n, the last set bit to turn to 0 identifies the highest set bit.
If the index of the highest set bit is x, the answer is 2x - 1.
